titles.text: Tantei Jinguji Saburo DS: Akai Chou
探偵神宮寺三郎 DS 赤い蝶

descriptions.text: The 4th entry in the Tantei Jinguuji Saburo franchise that revolves around a series of political bombings that occurred 20 years ago and current bombings that are targeting lawmakers. Saburo is charged with the task of uncovering the identify of the terrorist responsible for the bombings named "Red Butterfly"!
